# Herbert Bay - AI Product & Engineering Leader

AI Product & Engineering Leader who builds and scales systems to revenue • PhD Computer Vision (ETH Zurich) • 7 AI Products • 4 Ventures • 2 Exits • 40K+ Citations

## Summary

AI Product & Engineering Leader with 20+ years building and scaling AI systems to revenue. Led technical teams at Magic Leap, founded companies that reached successful exits (Qualcomm acquisition), and currently CEO of Earkick with 250K+ users. PhD in Computer Vision from ETH Zurich, co-creator of SURF algorithm (40K+ citations). Combines hands-on engineering leadership with product strategy and P&L ownership. Proven track record taking systems from prototype to production at scale, driving user growth and monetization across consumer and enterprise markets.

## Current

**Mia21** - https://mia21.com
Co-Founder & CEO • AI Memory Platform
Engineering & Product: Built enterprise conversational AI infrastructure from ground up. Multi-platform SDKs (iOS, Android, Python, Javascript), LLM-agnostic architecture, real-time memory system handling millions of conversations.
Scale & Revenue: Powers 250K+ active users across consumer and enterprise deployments. B2B SaaS model with API-based monetization.

**Earkick** - https://earkick.com  
Co-Founder & CEO • Mental Health AI (2021-Present)
Engineering & Product: Led full-stack development of AI mental health platform with real-time biomarker analysis, NLP-powered mood tracking, and privacy-first architecture (on-device ML).
Scale & Revenue: 250K+ users, 4.8★ rating. Featured by Apple, TIME, Forbes. Freemium model with premium subscriptions. Revenue-generating since 2023.

## Background

**Education**
PhD Computer Vision, ETH Zurich (2009)
Lead-inventor of SURF algorithm • 40,000+ citations • Koenderink Prize 2016

**Ventures**
- kooaba (2006-2014) — Co-founder & CEO • Built first cloud-based image recognition platform • Scaled to millions of queries/month • Exit to Qualcomm 2014 (now powers Snapchat AR)
- 47nord (2012-2023) — Co-founder & Board Member • Built and scaled Shortcut (secure notes) and Inspiced (AI cooking) to profitability
- Captural (2019-2023) — CEO & Co-initiator • Built AI photo-book system processing 100K+ books annually at Ifolor
- Earkick (2021-Present) — Co-founder & CEO • 250K+ users, revenue-generating mental health AI platform

**AI Products**
- Mia21 — AI memory platform for conversational AI
- Earkick — Mental health AI with real-time biomarker analysis
- PMF Engine — AI-powered product-market fit assessment
- kooaba — Cloud-based image recognition (now Snapchat AR)
- Captural — AI photo-book creation
- Shortcut — Secure notes with AI features
- Inspiced — AI-powered cooking recommendations

**Engineering Leadership**
- Magic Leap — Head of Computer Vision & Machine Learning • Led team of 15+ engineers building AR perception systems
- kooaba (Qualcomm) — VP Engineering post-acquisition • Scaled image recognition infrastructure to handle 10M+ daily queries
- Ifolor — Board of Directors (2019-2023) • Technical oversight for e-commerce platform ($50M+ revenue)

## Stats

- 7 AI products built
- 4 ventures founded (kooaba, 47nord, Captural, Earkick)
- 2 successful exits (Qualcomm 2014, Captural/Ifolor 2023)
- 40,000+ research citations (SURF algorithm)
- 22+ years experience in AI/ML/Computer Vision
